sessionStart.description: Start VILLaiN browser surface and open it
sessionStart.bash: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && node src/server.mjs &disown && sleep 1 && open http://127.0.0.1:5757/
sessionStart.powershell: Push-Location $PSScriptRoot\..\..;  if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5757 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process node -ArgumentList 'src/server.mjs' -WindowStyle Hidden }; Start-Process 'http://127.0.0.1:5757/'; Pop-Location
